Upcoming opportunity
Proposed new role
RoomPriceGenie
Revenue Operations & AI Enablement Lead · Barcelona

RoomPriceGenie is the most intuitive revenue management solution for hoteliers — trusted by 4,000+ properties worldwide. This role focuses on scaling growth through smarter data, AI-powered workflows, and go-to-market efficiency. I will take ownership of operational AI execution, data quality, and market expansion support.

  • 📊
    Data & Revenue OperationsOwn commercial data quality, CRM governance, and enrichment workflows across the sales org.
  • 🤖
    AI EnablementMaximize AI tools across teams, automate repetitive workflows, and train staff on modern commercial processes.
  • 🌎
    Growth & Market ExpansionBuild scalable outbound systems and prepare account lists for new country launches.
The three pillars of the role
01
Data & Revenue Operations
  • Improve commercial data quality and CRM structure
  • Build scalable enrichment processes for contacts and hotel insights
  • Optimize the sales tech stack and reduce inefficiencies
  • Support strategic internal projects with leadership
02
AI Enablement & Workflow Efficiency
  • Maximize value of existing AI tools across commercial teams
  • Identify manual tasks and redesign through automation
  • Take ownership of AI execution from leadership
  • Train teams on modern AI workflows and best practices
03
Growth & Market Expansion
  • Build scalable outbound workflows and targeting logic
  • Prepare account lists for new country launches
  • Improve cross-functional alignment across Sales, Marketing & CS
  • Build a scalable growth engine with stronger data
